Body.Content:
Unlock the full value of your structured data by bringing SharePoint lists directly into your Microsoft Copilot Studio agents. With native support, customers can ground AI responses in up-to-date, business-critical data—such as tasks, inventory, customers, or operations—without manual data movement or complex integrations. This enables more accurate, context-aware copilots that reflect how your business runs, helping teams make faster decisions, reduce errors, and automate workflows with confidence.

GA date: September CY2026

Preview date: July CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot Studio: Use SharePoint lists as a knowledge source
